Certainly! Here's a rewritten version of your message without including any personally identifiable information (PII):

---

Subject: Confirmation of Compliance System Training

Dear [Recipient's Name],

Thank you for your kind response. We hope you are well.

We would like to confirm that the Compliance System Training will take place on Tuesday, [Date], at 4:00 PM – 5:00 PM. The training will be conducted in English and is scheduled to be held at [Location: tearms].

Please make sure to attend on time. Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,  
[Your Name]  
[Your Position]  
[Your Organization]  

---

Let me know if you'd like to adjust the tone or include additional details!
